img.style: cursor: pointer; object-fit: cover; height: 150px; width: 100%;

t.div: The selected date does not have enough available seats.

div.p: You have already booked this package for the selected date!

t.div: Validation error while booking. Please try again or contact support.

div.p: You have already booked this package for the same round date!

div.div: No upcoming dates available for this tour.

button.class: btn btn-light position-absolute top-50 start-0 translate-middle-y ms-3
button.style: border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; padding: 0; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); z-index: 1055;

button.class: btn btn-light position-absolute top-50 end-0 translate-middle-y me-3
button.style: border-radius: 50%; width: 40px; height: 40px; padding: 0; box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); z-index: 1055;

t.div:
Your booking has been confirmed and payment received.
Invoice generated.

t.p: You don't have any tour bookings yet.

span.t-attf-class: badge rounded-pill #{'bg-success' if booking.state == 'confirmed' else 'bg-info' if booking.state == 'draft' else 'bg-danger'}
badge #{'bg-success' if booking.state == 'confirmed' else 'bg-info' if booking.state == 'draft' else 'bg-danger'}

t.div: Your booking is currently in draft state. It will be confirmed by an administrator soon.

a.class: btn btn-secondary btn-lg px-4 me-2 shadow-sm
